{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/iron_ingot.png
|durability=1000
|mass_damage=3
|hardness_damage=6
|swing_speed=8.3
|tags=metal
|modifiers=N/A
}}


== Properties ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}
